subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-02-22
subcodes.first_line: It is very strange indeed how many particulars of my earliest childhood always stick to my memory. I remember when I was 4 or 5 years old there was a very poor old man in our street
subcodes.subjects: @youth and pre-ministry of Abdu'l-Baha, @stories; anecdotes, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @poems and quotation from poetry
